popularStory.headline: My Maternal 21st Great Grandfather, Sir  Cailein or Colin Mor Campbell, 9th. Knight of Lochawe, 1st. Clan Chief of Lochawe
popularStory.description:
Name: Sir Cailen or Colin Mor Campbell, 9th. Knight of Lochawe
Birth: January 1230 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland
Married: about 1250 in Argyll, Scotland to Lady Janet Isabel Sinclair, of Rosslyn,  daug …

burialPlace.address: Church of St. Peter The Deacon, Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland

zh.lifeSummary: 當Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell於1230年1月出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，他的父親Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow31歲，母親Errick MacDhonnchad31歲。他於大約1250年與Janet Isabel Sinclair在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1296年12月在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年66歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾可雷南。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell于1230年1月出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，他的父亲Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow31岁，母亲Errick MacDhonnchad31岁。他于大约1250年与Janet Isabel Sinclair在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1296年12月在苏格兰阿吉爾享年66岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾可雷南。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Camble
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Campbell  .

variants.name: Campbel
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Campbell  .

variants.name: Cambell
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Campbell  .

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Cailean
meanings: Gaelic: The Gaelic form of Colin.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Colin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Diminutive form of the medieval name Col(le), a short form of Nicholas . The medieval name died out after the 14th century. In the 19th century Colin was reintroduced to England from Scotland, where it is an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Cailean, particularly favoured among the Campbells and the MacKenzies, which relates to St Columba ( see Callum ) as Crìsdean does to Christ and Moirean to Mary.

variants.name: Collin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Colin .

nameMeanings.name: Mor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

en.lifeSummary: When Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell was born in January 1230, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow, was 31 and his mother, Errick MacDhonnchad, was 31. He married Janet Isabel Sinclair about 1250, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died in December 1296, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 66, and was buried in Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell est né en janvier 1230, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Errick MacDhonnchad, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Janet Isabel Sinclair environ 1250, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en décembre 1296, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1250 in Argyll, Scotland Janet Isabel Sinclair geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Dezember 1296 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell è nato il nel gennaio 1230 nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Errick MacDhonnchad, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Janet Isabel Sinclair circa 1250, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1296, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Cailean or Colin Mor Campbellが1230年1月にイギリススコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochowは31歳，母Errick MacDhonnchadは31歳であった。約1250年にスコットランドアルグイルでJanet Isabel Sinclairと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1296年12月にスコットランドアルグイルで66歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルチレナンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell(이)가 1230년 1월 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Errick MacDhonnchad(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1250년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Janet Isabel Sinclair(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1296년 12월 스컷랜드 아그이에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬크리난에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell nasceu em janeiro de 1230, em Lochawe, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Errick MacDhonnchad, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Isabel Sinclair aproximadamente 1250, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1296, em Argyll, Scotland, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Dunstaffnage, Scotland: рубха гарбх, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.Church of St. Peter The Deacon, Kilchren: килчренан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell родился январь 1230 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Errick MacDhonnchad, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Isabel Sinclair около 1250 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер декабрь 1296 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности килчренан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell nació en enero de 1230, en Lochawe, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Errick MacDhonnchad, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Janet Isabel Sinclair aproximadamente 1250, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1296, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido.
